title: Hot Pursuit!: Constantin Buschmann (Podcast)
title_cn: 热力追击！：康斯坦丁·布施曼（播客）
summary: Brabus owner and CEO Constantin Buschmann joins the show to talk about his life running the company his father co-founded in Bottrop, Germany, in 1977 - and why it was time to debut the newest car from Brabus, the $1 million Bodo. Plus the BMW M2 versus the BMW M4 and why everyone in the car world needs to start talking about tinnitus.

title: Masters in Business: Jason Wenk (Podcast)
title_cn: 商业硕士：Jason Wenk（播客）
summary: Barry speaks with Jason Wenk, founder and CEO of Altruist, a modern custodian for independent financial advisors. They discuss how Jason started the company and his plans to change asset management. Jason also weighs in on the state of RIAs, and AI.

title: Engine Maker CFM Seeks to Lift Deliveries to Help Jet Output
title_cn: 发动机制造商 CFM 寻求提高交付量以帮助喷气式飞机输出
summary: CFM International, which provides engines to Boeing Co. and Airbus SE for their single-aisle airliners, aims to deliver 15% more units this year to support an increase in aircraft production, with jet power plants turning into a major choke-point for output.

title: Distressed US Companies Find a British Detour Around Chapter 11
title_cn: 陷入困境的美国公司绕道英国《破产法》第十一章
summary: UK plans that cut debt, preserve equity and avoid the public glare are catching on

title: HDFC Bank Profit Falls Short as Net Interest Margins Shrink
title_cn: 由于净息差缩水，HDFC 银行利润下降
summary: HDFC Bank Ltd., India’s largest private sector lender facing investor scrutiny on governance concerns, posted lower-than-expected results as margins shrunk.

title: Telecom Italia Board Endorses Poste Italiane’s €10.8 Billion Takeover Offer
title_cn: 意大利电信董事会批准意大利邮政 108 亿欧元的收购要约
summary: Telecom Italia SpA’s board unanimously endorsed Poste Italiane SpA’s €10.8 billion ($12.4 billion) takeover offer as financially fair, the company said in a statement on Saturday.

title: Vanishing CLO Profits Are Sparking Infighting: Credit Weekly
title_cn: CLO 利润消失正在引发内讧：《信贷周刊》
summary: A type of investment that once generated some of Wall Street’s juiciest fixed-income returns has deteriorated so badly that investors are heading for the exits and arguing about who’s to blame.

title: Kuwait Energy Infrastructure Hit During Intense Iran Attacks
title_cn: 科威特能源基础设施在伊朗猛烈袭击中受损
summary: Kuwait suffered one of its worst nights of Iranian retaliatory attacks since the Middle East conflict began, with strikes on an oil facility and a second power plant hit in as many days.

title: Zelenskyy May Fire Commander Syrskyi After Protests, FT Reports
title_cn: 据英国《金融时报》报道，泽连斯基可能在抗议后解雇指挥官西尔斯基
summary: Ukraine President Volodymyr Zelenskyy is considering firing Armed Forces commander-in-chief Oleksandr Syrskyi, the Financial Times reported, following days of turmoil engulfing the country’s military leadership.

title: Not Done Yet Refunding Tariffs or Realizing AI’s Promise
title_cn: 尚未完成退税或实现人工智能的承诺
summary: The markets continue to be dominated by news of artificial intelligence

title: ICICI Bank’s First-Quarter Profit Beats Estimate as Loans Surge
title_cn: 随着贷款激增，ICICI 银行第一季度利润超出预期
summary: ICICI Bank Ltd. posted better-than-expected results as India’s second-largest private-sector lender benefited from healthy loan growth across retail and corporate segments.

title: India Moves Against Youth Protesters Before Parliament Session
title_cn: 印度在议会会议前对青年抗议者采取行动
summary: Indian authorities moved against protesters in New Delhi ahead of demonstrations against unemployment and alleged examination scams, as the movement adds pressure on Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s government.

title: China Seeks Stable, Transparent Mineral Rules From Indonesia
title_cn: 中国寻求印尼稳定、透明的矿产规则
summary: China said it hopes Indonesia can provide a stable and transparent policy environment for its mineral sector, as the two countries deepen economic ties.

title: Hungary Crackdown on $20 Billion EV Sector Puts China on Notice
title_cn: 匈牙利对200亿美元电动汽车行业的打击引起中国注意
summary: Hungary’s $20 billion electric-vehicle industry, which has long enjoyed the protection of former premier Viktor Orban, is facing a reckoning as the country’s new leadership cracks down on environmental violations and looks to raise taxes.

title: China Urges Better Cooperation With Kyrgyzstan on Green Minerals
title_cn: 中国敦促与吉尔吉斯斯坦加强绿色矿产合作
summary: China urged stronger cooperation with Kyrgyzstan across the green minerals industrial chain, while calling for the protection of the rights and interests of Chinese companies in the country, according to a statement from the Ministry of Commerce on Saturday.

title: China’s Siemens Competitor Eyes Buying Its Way Into Europe
title_cn: 中国的西门子竞争对手希望通过收购进入欧洲
summary: Shenzhen Inovance Technology Co. Ltd. is considering acquisitions in Europe, signaling the Chinese company is readying a push to compete in Europe with industrial incumbents like Siemens AG and top auto supplier Robert Bosch GmbH.

title: China Solar Cell Exports Extend Decline in June
title_cn: 6月份中国太阳能电池出口延续下滑
summary: China’s solar cell exports fell for a second month in June, an indication that overseas demand is weakening after a surge in shipments earlier in the year.

title: Sheinbaum, Carney to Watch World Cup Final With Trump
title_cn: 辛鲍姆、卡尼将与特朗普一起观看世界杯决赛
summary: Mexican President Claudia Sheinbaum and Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney will travel to the US to attend Sunday’s World Cup final on President Donald Trump’s invitation, creating the opportunity for a reset after a month filled with regional tensions.

title: Apple Briefly Tops Nvidia as World’s Most Valuable Company
title_cn: 苹果短暂超越英伟达成为全球最有价值公司
summary: Apple Inc. briefly overtook Nvidia Corp. as the world’s most valuable company, a title the chipmaker has held since May 2025.

title: Moonshot’s Kimi Upends Conventional Wisdom on US Lead Over China
title_cn: Moonshot 的 Kimi 颠覆了美国对中国领先地位的传统看法
summary: At an event in Beijing earlier this year, some of China’s top artificial intelligence leaders warned that the country remained meaningfully behind the US in developing cutting-edge AI models, with one executive arguing that “the gap may actually be widening.”

title: China Joins Rush to Rethink the Smartphone for the AI Era
title_cn: 中国加入重新思考人工智能时代智能手机的行列
summary: ZTE Corp. showcased for the first time a lineup of co-designed smartphones with built-in AI services, joining a growing number of Chinese companies trying to reimagine mobile devices with artificial intelligence at the core.

title: Apple Raises iPhone 17 Price by 10% in Japan as Yen Stays Weak
title_cn: 日元持续疲软，苹果将 iPhone 17 在日本的售价提高 10%
summary: Apple Inc. raised the prices of iPhones and some other products in Japan as the local currency continues to hover near its lowest level in four decades.

title: China Dismisses Claim that It Illicitly Extracts Foreign AI Tech
title_cn: 中国否认非法窃取外国人工智能技术的说法
summary: China brushed off allegations that the country distills foreign technology, after US firms including Anthropic PBC said Chinese rivals illicitly extract results from top American models to advance their own capabilities.

title: China’s Moonshot Unveils AI Model, Fueling Tech Rout
title_cn: 中国的登月计划推出人工智能模型，助推技术溃败
summary: Chinese AI pioneer Moonshot unveiled a new model that it claims performs on par with some of the top-tier platforms from OpenAI and Anthropic PBC, the latest sign that the Asian country’s artificial intelligence labs are closing a technology gap with the US.

title: US Strikes Iran to ‘Punish’ It for Attack That Killed 2 Troops
title_cn: 美国打击伊朗以“惩罚”其造成两名士兵死亡的袭击
summary: The US launched fresh strikes on Iran Saturday, a day after two American service members were killed in Jordan by Iranian missile and drone attacks.

title: Brazil’s Justice Moraes Bars Milei From Visiting Jair Bolsonaro
title_cn: 巴西法官莫赖斯禁止米莱探访贾尔·博尔索纳罗
summary: Brazil Supreme Court Justice Alexandre de Moraes denied a request for Argentine President Javier Milei to visit former Brazilian President Jair Bolsonaro, citing a 30-day suspension of all non-essential visits imposed this week while the former president is under house arrest.

title: Hungary’s President Ends His Own Term in Bow to New Premier
title_cn: 匈牙利总统结束自己的任期，向新总理致敬
summary: Hungarian President Tamas Sulyok signed a constitutional amendment ending his presidency, capping Prime Minister Peter Magyar’s rapid effort to dismantle key pillars of the Viktor Orban era.

title: Two US Troops Killed, One Missing After Iran Strikes Neighbors
title_cn: 伊朗袭击邻国后两名美军死亡，一名失踪
summary: Two American service members were killed, four were injured and one is missing after an Iranian attack in Jordan, the US military announced, following several days of intensifying strikes from both sides.

title: GOP Lawmaker Ralph Norman Says He Will Seek Graham’s Senate Seat
title_cn: 共和党议员拉尔夫·诺曼表示，他将寻求格雷厄姆的参议院席位
summary: Republican Representative Ralph Norman said he will run for South Carolina’s open Senate seat, setting up a potential primary contest with the late Senator Lindsey Graham’s sister.

title: Iran, US Strikes Ramp Up as Tehran Declares Peace Deal Abandoned
title_cn: 德黑兰宣布放弃和平协议，伊朗和美国加强打击
summary: Iran unleashed heavy attacks on Gulf neighbors in retaliation for the latest US strikes as Tehran said it was suspending its commitments under the interim peace deal.

title: Merz Ally Spahn Quits After Surrogacy Sparks Party Backlash
title_cn: 代孕引发政党强烈反对后，默兹·艾莉·斯潘退出
summary: Jens Spahn, a senior leader in Chancellor Friedrich Merz’s conservative party, resigned after coming under pressure for fathering a child through a surrogate in the US despite previously opposing efforts to legalize the practice in Germany.

title: China Urges UK to Protect Investors After British Steel Move
title_cn: 英国钢铁搬迁后中国敦促英国保护投资者
summary: China urged Britain to protect the rights and interests of Chinese investors after the UK government nationalized British Steel, previously controlled by China’s Jingye Group.

title: Russia, Ukraine Exchange Fresh Strikes on Warehouses, Ports
title_cn: 俄罗斯和乌克兰对仓库和港口进行新一轮罢工
summary: Russia and Ukraine exchanged fresh airstrikes into Saturday, with Kyiv targeting several Russian regions with drones, including a deadly hit on facilities operated by a major online retailer, and Moscow hitting Ukrainian ports.

title: Malaysia Probes State Pension’s Loss Linked to eFishery Collapse
title_cn: 马来西亚调查国家养老金损失与电子渔业崩溃有关
summary: Malaysia’s anti-graft agency has opened an investigation into losses tied to state pension fund Kumpulan Wang Persaraan Diperbadankan’s investment in failed Indonesian agritech startup eFishery.

title: Botswana Says Citizens Recruited for Russia War at Alarming Rate
title_cn: 博茨瓦纳称，为俄罗斯战争招募公民的速度惊人
summary: Botswana’s Ministry of International Relations said a rising number of citizens are being coerced into fighting for Russia in its war against Ukraine.

title: Germany Raises Threat Level Over Terror Attack Risk, Welt Says
title_cn: 世界报称德国提高恐怖袭击风险威胁级别
summary: Germany raised its threat level over the risk of terrorist attacks, Interior Minister Alexander Dobrindt said in an interview, as Chancellor Friedrich Merz’s government prepares to expand the operational powers of the country’s intelligence agencies.

title: Burnham Faces Key Call on Whether to Let Trump Use UK Bases
title_cn: 伯纳姆面临是否允许特朗普使用英国基地的关键呼吁
summary: The resumption of US strikes against Iran has thrust incoming UK prime minister Andy Burnham into a potential day one decision on how much to support Britain’s closest ally in its controversial military campaign.

title: The Most Political of World Cups Reaches Climax With Trump at Final
title_cn: 最具政治性的世界杯因特朗普晋级决赛而达到高潮
summary: The quadrennial football competition reaches its climax on Sunday with a whole range of geopolitical subplots.

title: Germany to Slash Renewable Subsidies As Solar Surge Tests Grids
title_cn: 德国将削减可再生能源补贴以应对太阳能激增对电网的考验
summary: Germany plans to scale back renewable-energy subsidies in a sweeping overhaul of its funding system, as surging solar output puts growing strain on the country’s power grid.

title: Indian Filmmakers Fear Rising Censorship as Film Is Blocked
title_cn: 由于电影被封锁，印度电影制片人担心审查制度的加强
summary: For roughly four years, Honey Trehan went back and forth with Indian film authorities trying to get his movie about a Sikh human rights activist into theaters. Censors demanded cut after cut, he said, eventually asking for 127 alterations before he gave up and took the film, “Satluj,” to a streaming platform earlier this month.

title: German Far-Right ‘Trojan Horse’ Triggers Alarm Over Intelligence
title_cn: 德国极右翼“特洛伊木马”引发情报警报
summary: German security authorities are rushing to ensure sensitive information is kept safe in the event that the country’s far-right party takes government control for the first time in an eastern region later this year.

title: Andy Burnham’s Vow to Change UK Labour Already Risks Coming Unstuck
title_cn: 安迪·伯纳姆（Andy Burnham）改变英国劳工的誓言已经面临落空的风险
summary: Andy Burnham wanted to take over as Britain’s prime minister on a wave of hope, positive vibes and a promise to end the Labour Party infighting that marred Keir Starmer’s premiership. That optimism is fading before he’s even taken office.

title: China Lauds US Restoration of HK Privileges Revoked by Trump
title_cn: 中国赞扬美国恢复被特朗普取消的香港特权
summary: The US restored privileges for Hong Kong that President Donald Trump revoked in 2020, in his first term, triggering praise from China, which described the move as an important step toward improving bilateral ties.

title: US Renews Strikes on Iran, Pushing Oil Up Most Since April
title_cn: 美国重启对伊朗的打击，推高油价自四月以来最大涨幅
summary: The US and Iran traded attacks again on Friday, pressuring oil prices and making a quick return to the fragile ceasefire deal signed last month even less likely.
